additional_metadata.note: Co-hosted with Data Queens, Israel's community for women in data; talks delivered in Hebrew, open to all genders.

events.agenda: 18:00-18:30 Welcome & Networking; 18:30-18:40 Welcome Remarks; 18:40-19:00 Talk 1; 19:00-19:30 Talk 2; 19:30-20:00 Talk 3; 20:00-20:30 Networking & Closing.
events.event_description: dbt Meetups are networking events open to all folks working with data! Talks predominantly focus on community members' experience with dbt, however, you'll catch presentations on broader topics such as analytics engineering, data stacks, data ops, modeling, testing, and team structures.
events.event_name: dbt & Data Queens Meetup | TLV | Sep 5th 2023 | HEBREW
events.location: monday.com, Yitzhak Sadeh St 6, Tel Aviv-Yafo
events.raw_text:
Tue, Sep 5, 2023 · 6:00 PM to 9:00 PM IDT

18:40 Danielle Kendal, Rapyd: "Why i got dbt?"
19:00 Michal Schwartz, At-Bay: "The Power of dbt Macros"
19:30 Shira Mairantz, Tipalti: "A Journey Through DBT Evolution at Tipalti"

talks.description: Danielle's data journey and an actual use case of how she utilized dbt to solve data problems.
talks.raw_text_excerpt: "Why i got dbt? (and how it solved all my data problems*)" Danielle will share her data journey, an actual use case and how she utilized dbt to solve it.
talks.title: Why I Got dbt? (And How It Solved All My Data Problems)

talks.description: A technical deep dive into dbt macros, showing how they enhanced data transformations and played a crucial role in building the At-Bay Data Warehouse infrastructure.
talks.raw_text_excerpt: "The Power of dbt Macros: Elevating Your Snapshot Process to the Next Level" Join Michal for a technical deep dive into the world of dbt macros.
talks.title: The Power of dbt Macros: Elevating Your Snapshot Process to the Next Level

talks.description: Multiple checkpoints along the dbt life cycle within Tipalti, including a pause at the significant growth station.
talks.raw_text_excerpt: "A Journey Through DBT Evolution at Tipalti" Shira will guide us through multiple checkpoints along the dbt life cycle within Tipalti.
talks.title: A Journey Through dbt Evolution at Tipalti

additional_metadata.note: First official Tel Aviv dbt Meetup.

events.agenda: 6:00pm Doors open; 6:30-6:55pm Talk 1 + Q&A; 6:55-7:05pm Break; 7:05-7:30pm Talk 2 + Q&A; 7:30-8:30pm Networking and refreshments.
events.event_description: We are excited to help bring TLV-based folks in the dbt Community together! dbt Meetups are networking events open to all folks working with data.
events.raw_text:
Tue, Sep 6, 2022 · 6:00 PM to 9:00 PM IDT

Talk #1: dbt at Elementor - Slowly Changing Dimensions (type 2) from event based data stream using dbt (Daniel Harari, Elementor)
Talk #2: dbt Artifacts - Unlocking their Potential (Or Avidov, Elementary Data)

talks.description: How Elementor implements Slowly Changing Dimensions (type 2) from an event-based data stream using dbt.
talks.raw_text_excerpt: dbt at Elementor - Slowly Changing Dimensions (type 2) from event based data stream using dbt (Daniel Harari, Data Engineer @ Elementor)
talks.title: dbt at Elementor: Slowly Changing Dimensions (Type 2) from Event-Based Data Stream Using dbt

talks.description: Macros, models and tests written to unlock the potential of dbt artifacts for various use cases.
talks.raw_text_excerpt: dbt Artifacts - Unlocking their Potential: This talk will show macros, models and tests they wrote to utilize dbt artifacts for some use cases. (Or Avidov, CTO @ Elementary Data)
talks.title: dbt Artifacts: Unlocking Their Potential

excluded_events.reason: Global multi-day dbt Labs conference cross-posted to this group, not Tel Aviv-specific
